title: X-Men #4
keyDetails: First appearances of Quicksilver, Scarlet Witch, Toad, and the Brotherhood of Evil Mutants. Second appearance of Magneto.
credits: Stan Lee story. Jack Kirby and Paul Reinman cover and art.
presentation: A major early Silver Age X-Men key with vivid red and yellow cover color, strong character presentation, and attractive overall eye appeal for the assigned grade.

images.alt: X-Men #4 CGC 5.5 front cover and CGC label
X-Men #4 CGC 5.5 back cover and CGC label

title: X-Men #9
keyDetails: First meeting of the X-Men and the Avengers. First appearance of Lucifer. Marvel Girl pin-up.
credits: Stan Lee story. Jack Kirby and Chic Stone cover and art.
presentation: A sharp mid-high-grade example with strong color, clean registration, and excellent overall presentation. The full slab and CGC label are clearly shown in the gallery.

X-Men #9 CGC 7.5 back cover and CGC label
